narration: Science has a clearer story about airborne vs droplet than social media does.
visual_description: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about airborne vs droplet than social media does.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about airborne vs droplet than social media does.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about airborne vs droplet than social media does.

narration: Airborne transmission involves tiny particles lingering in the air for hours. Think of aerosols.
visual_description: Context visual: Airborne transmission involves tiny particles lingering in the air for hours. Think of aerosols.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Airborne transmission involves tiny particles lingering in the air for hours. Think of aerosols.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Airborne transmission involves tiny particles lingering in the air for hours. Think of aerosols.

narration: Droplet transmission, on the other hand, is larger, heavier droplets that fall quickly—think sneezes and coughs.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Droplet transmission, on the other hand, is larger, heavier droplets that fall quickly—think sneezes and coughs.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Droplet transmission, on the other hand, is larger, heavier droplets that fall quickly—think sneezes and coughs.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Droplet transmission, on the other hand, is larger, heavier droplets that fall quickly—think sneezes and coughs.

narration: Studies show airborne viruses can travel distances over 6 feet, while droplets typically travel less.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies show airborne viruses can travel distances over 6 feet, while droplets typically travel less.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Studies show airborne viruses can travel distances over 6 feet, while droplets typically travel less.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Studies show airborne viruses can travel distances over 6 feet, while droplets typically travel less.

narration: Understanding this helps us make better choices about masks and ventilation.
